[category]
matching
[prompt]
In Alice's Wonderland, secret processing rules are used on text.

x: not matched anywhere
y: matched but wrong position

0 1001100100 4
1 0000001011 3
2 1101001010 5
3 1101111110 8
4 0110111111 8
5 0111011111 8
6 1111011011 8
7 1111111110 9

12 21 0110111111 8 match 4
23 32 0111011111 8 match 5
34 43 1111011011 8 match 6
45 54 1111111110 9 match 7
56 65 1011100110 6
67 76 1001101111 7
70 07 1101001011 6

25 52 1111111111 a
36 63 1111110111 9
